<!-- 
Thank you for taking the time to file a bug report!
Please fill out the sections below — the more detail, the faster we can help.
Remove any sections that don't apply to your issue.
-->

### Environment

- **App/Version**: <!-- e.g. v2.3.1, commit hash abc1234, or "main branch as of 2025-03-10" -->
- **Deployment**: <!-- Local / Docker / AWS ECS / Azure App Service / Vercel / Fly.io / Render / Railway / Kubernetes / Other: ______ -->
- **Operating System**: <!-- Windows 11 23H2 / macOS Sonoma 14.4 / Ubuntu 24.04 / iOS 18.1 / Android 15 etc. -->
- **Browser** (if web app): <!-- Chrome 123 / Firefox 124 / Safari 17.4 / Edge 123 / Brave / etc. – include version -->
- **Browser Version**:
- **Device** (if relevant): <!-- Desktop / iPhone 15 Pro / Pixel 9 / etc. -->
- **Screen Resolution** (if UI-related): <!-- 1920×1080, 390×844 (iPhone), etc. -->

### Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error / unexpected behavior

### Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### Actual behavior

What actually happened (include screenshots, videos, logs, error messages, stack traces, etc. if possible).

### Screenshots / Recordings

<!-- 
Drag & drop images here, or use GitHub's "Attach files" button.
For videos: preferably a short .mp4 or .webm (< 10 MB), or link to a YouTube/Loom/etc.
Before/after screenshots are extremely helpful for UI bugs.
-->

### Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.

- Related issues/PRs: 
- Workarounds you’ve found (if any):
- Logs / console output / network requests (if relevant):
- Configuration / relevant settings:
- Did this start happening after a specific version / deployment / change?

### Severity / Impact (optional – helps with prioritization)

- [ ] Critical – prevents using the product/feature entirely
- [ ] High – major feature broken for many users
- [ ] Medium – annoying but workaround exists
- [ ] Low – minor/cosmetic
